name: Dragonhawk Fold Pro – Year of Snake Edition
shortDescription: Premium wireless tattoo machine with 3000 mAh battery, adjustable stroke length (2.4–4.2 mm). Ideal for lining, shading, and color packing alike.
description:
The Dragonhawk Fold Pro – Year of Snake Edition is a premium quality wireless tattoo machine designed for professional artists.

The machine features a 3000 mAh built-in battery, allowing hours of use without cables. The adjustable stroke length (2.4–4.2 mm) is ideal for lining, shading, and color packing alike.

The powerful yet quiet motor provides smooth needle movement and stable operation in any style. The excellent weight distribution and ergonomic grip design allow comfortable handling even during longer sessions.

The unique Year of Snake design not only gives a stylish appearance but also guarantees Dragonhawk's premium quality.
metaTitle: Dragonhawk Fold Pro Snake Edition – Wireless professional tattoo machine
metaDescription: The Dragonhawk Fold Pro wireless tattoo machine with 3000 mAh battery, adjustable stroke length, ideal for both lining and shading.

final.headline: Interested in the Dragonhawk Fold Pro?

featureRows.headline: Why is the Fold Pro Snake Edition the pros' choice?
featureRows.subtitle: Performance, style, and versatility – without compromises

features.title: Wide-range adjustable stroke length (2.4–4.2 mm)
features.description: The Fold Pro's stroke length is adjustable from 2.4 mm to 4.2 mm, which is an exceptionally wide range among tattoo machines. This enables everything from fine contour lines to detailed shading to solid color packing with a single machine.

features.title: 3000 mAh battery – all-day operation
features.description: The large capacity 3000 mAh built-in battery provides hours of uninterrupted work. This means it can last through an entire working day on a single charge.

features.title: Powerful yet quiet motor
features.description: The Fold Pro's motor provides stable and powerful needle movement with minimal noise and vibration. The smooth operation enables precise line work and even coloring, while also providing a more comfortable experience for the client.

features.title: Ergonomic design and excellent weight distribution
features.description: The ergonomic grip design and excellent weight distribution together ensure comfortable handling even during multi-hour sessions. The compact, foldable design also makes transportation easier.

training.headline: Tattoo machine operator training
training.intro: Professional tattoo machine operator training is available for the Dragonhawk Fold Pro, provided within an officially registered adult education program.
items: Operating principles of the Fold Pro and stroke length adjustment
Contour lines and fine line work techniques
Needle cartridge selection for different techniques
Hygiene protocols and sterile work practices
closingParagraphs: You are welcome to bring a model to the training so you can learn the techniques in a real-world setting.
Upon completion of the training, we issue an official certificate.
If you are interested in the training opportunity, please contact us through any of our channels to schedule an appointment!

testimonials.name: B. Dávid
testimonials.text: The Fold Pro Snake Edition is a dream machine! <mark>The stroke length range is huge, so I can do everything with it</mark> – fine lines, shading, coloring. The battery lasts all day too. And the design is simply gorgeous.

expertQuote.quote: The Fold Pro is one of Dragonhawk's most powerful tattoo machines. The 2.4–4.2 mm stroke length range and 3000 mAh battery combination is an excellent choice for professionals.
expertQuote.author: Horváth László

faq.question: What styles is the Fold Pro suitable for?
faq.answer: Thanks to the adjustable stroke length (2.4–4.2 mm), it is suitable for virtually every tattoo style: fine lines (fineline), lining, shading, and solid color packing. One machine for every technique.

faq.question: How long does the battery last?
faq.answer: The 3000 mAh battery provides hours of continuous work. The exact runtime depends on the set frequency and intensity, but it is generally sufficient for a full working day.

faq.question: Can it be used for permanent makeup too?
faq.answer: The Fold Pro is primarily designed for body tattooing, but with smaller stroke length settings (2.4 mm) it can also be suitable for permanent makeup. However, if you're looking for a machine exclusively for permanent makeup, the MAST P60 or Nano 2 is a more targeted choice.

faq.question: What needle cartridges is it compatible with?
faq.answer: The Fold Pro uses a universal cartridge system. It is compatible with MAST Oceanheart and WJX needle cartridges, as well as other standard cartridge needles.

faq.question: What's the difference between the Snake Edition and the standard Fold Pro?
faq.answer: The Snake Edition differs in its unique Year of Snake design. From a technical standpoint, it delivers identical performance to the standard Fold Pro – the difference is solely in the unique appearance.

faq.question: What warranty applies to the machine?
faq.answer: The Dragonhawk Fold Pro comes with a 1-year warranty. We provide a replacement device during repairs.

whatsIncluded: Dragonhawk Fold Pro Snake Edition tattoo machine
